desc: Large burrito with pork carnitas, pineapple, rice, cheese, lettuce, pickled onions, siracha mayo and pico del gallo. 大墨西哥捲餅，裡面有燉豬肉、鳳梨、米飯、起司、生菜、醃洋蔥、是拉差蛋黃醬和莎莎醬.

desc: Large burrito with beans, mushrooms, rice, cheese, lettuce, pickled onions, Sriracha mayo, and salsa. 大份墨西哥捲餅配有豆類、蘑菇、米飯、起司、生菜、醃洋蔥、是拉差蛋黃醬和莎莎醬.
